name: Antiquities
collationMethod: striped, 11x11 sheets; common sheet + uncommon sheet

draft.notes: 8-card booster: 6 from the common sheet, 2 from the uncommon sheet. No rare slot. Packs can be front- or back-facing; uncommons may come before or after commons. Pre-foil era.

statedRates: no separate rares; effective rarity depends on the sheet and how many times a card is printed on it (C1/C2/C4 commons; U1/U2/U3 uncommons)
sourceNotes: Small set, 85 cards (100 counting art variations). Two print sheets only (common + uncommon); no distinct rare rarity. Page classes cards by print frequency, so composition counts left null. Printed Belgium. 60 packs per box.
